requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS Regime in Uganda
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——乌干达无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——烏干達無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Uganda does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting the 10 hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP) in electrical and electronic equipment as a market-access condition. There is no Uganda equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU and no requirement for a RoHS Declaration of Conformity to place LED luminaires on the Uganda market. UNBS market access is governed by the PVoC programme focused on product safety, EMC, and (where applicable) energy performance — not by a horizontal substance-restriction directive. Some hazardous-substance controls in Uganda derive from general environmental, chemicals, and waste legislation and from any product-specific standard provisions (e.g., mercury limits in certain lamp types tied to international commitments), but these do not form a comprehensive RoHS-style electronics substance ban tested for the consignment CoC. Exporters should still observe customer/contractual RoHS expectations and any product-specific limits, but should not assume a Uganda horizontal RoHS test is a market-entry gate.
summary.zh: 乌干达不实行欧盟式的、将电气电子设备中 10 项有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）限制作为市场准入条件的横向 RoHS 制度。乌干达无相当于指令 2011/65/EU 的制度，亦无须出具 RoHS 符合性声明即可将 LED 灯具投放乌干达市场。UNBS 市场准入由聚焦产品安全、EMC 及（适用时）能效的 PVoC 方案管辖——而非横向物质限制指令。乌干达部分有害物质管控源自一般环境、化学品及废弃物立法，以及任何产品特定标准条款（如与国际承诺挂钩的特定灯型汞限值），但这些不构成为批次 CoC 检测的全面 RoHS 式电子物质禁令。出口商仍应遵守客户/合同 RoHS 期望及任何产品特定限值，但不应假定乌干达横向 RoHS 检测是市场准入门槛。
summary.zht: 烏干達不實行歐盟式的、將電氣電子設備中 10 項有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯 DEHP/BBP/DBP/DIBP）限制作為市場准入條件的橫向 RoHS 制度。烏干達無相當於指令 2011/65/EU 的制度，亦無須出具 RoHS 符合性聲明即可將 LED 燈具投放烏干達市場。UNBS 市場准入由聚焦產品安全、EMC 及（適用時）能效的 PVoC 方案管轄——而非橫向物質限制指令。烏干達部分有害物質管控源自一般環境、化學品及廢棄物立法，以及任何產品特定標準條款（如與國際承諾掛鈎的特定燈型汞限值），但這些不構成為批次 CoC 檢測的全面 RoHS 式電子物質禁令。出口商仍應遵守客戶/合同 RoHS 期望及任何產品特定限值，但不應假定烏干達橫向 RoHS 檢測是市場准入門檻。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal Uganda RoHS regime equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU — no RoHS Declaration of Conformity required for market access
Uganda general environmental / chemicals / waste legislation (NEMA framework) and product-specific standard provisions where applicable
UNBS PVoC programme — safety/EMC/energy focus, not a horizontal substance-restriction directive

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, together with China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014) which requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS focuses on disclosure labelling rather than restricting market access, and the four EU phthalates are not yet in China's mandatory restricted list as of 2026.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，并配合中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色）。中国 RoHS 侧重披露标签而非限制市场准入，截至 2026 年四项欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，並配合中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色）。中國 RoHS 側重披露標籤而非限制市場准入，截至 2026 年四項歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (China — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Unlike the EU (where RoHS 2 plus the four added phthalates is a hard market-access gate with a mandatory RoHS DoC), Uganda has no horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime tied to market entry — so a Chinese exporter does NOT face a Uganda RoHS test or DoC requirement as a PVoC condition. Compared with China, China at least operates a disclosure-label regime (GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364) for the original 6 substances; Uganda does not even require that disclosure label for market access. Practical guidance: (1) RoHS is not a Uganda PVoC gate, so the EU phthalate-testing burden does not transfer to Uganda export; (2) however, buyers, multinationals, or downstream re-export to RoHS markets may still demand RoHS compliance contractually — honour such requirements where they exist; (3) any product-specific substance limits in an applicable Uganda/EAC standard (e.g., mercury in specific lamp categories) should be checked, but these are narrow and product-specific, not a horizontal electronics ban. Be careful not to over-state Uganda obligations: there is no Uganda horizontal RoHS.
gap.zh: 与欧盟（RoHS 2 加四项新增邻苯二甲酸酯为硬性市场准入门槛并须强制 RoHS 符合性声明）不同，乌干达无与市场准入挂钩的横向 RoHS 物质限制制度——故中国出口商不会面临作为 PVoC 条件的乌干达 RoHS 检测或符合性声明要求。与中国相比，中国至少对原 6 项物质设有披露标签制度（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）；乌干达甚至不要求该披露标签作为市场准入条件。实务指引：（1）RoHS 不是乌干达 PVoC 门槛，故欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯检测负担不转移至乌干达出口；（2）但买家、跨国企业或下游再出口至 RoHS 市场仍可能在合同上要求 RoHS 合规——在存在此类要求时应遵守；（3）应核查适用乌干达/EAC 标准中的任何产品特定物质限值（如特定灯型汞限值），但这些范围狭窄且产品特定，并非横向电子禁令。注意不要夸大乌干达义务：乌干达无横向 RoHS。
gap.zht: 與歐盟（RoHS 2 加四項新增鄰苯二甲酸酯為硬性市場准入門檻並須強制 RoHS 符合性聲明）不同，烏干達無與市場准入掛鈎的橫向 RoHS 物質限制制度——故中國出口商不會面臨作為 PVoC 條件的烏干達 RoHS 檢測或符合性聲明要求。與中國相比，中國至少對原 6 項物質設有披露標籤制度（GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364）；烏干達甚至不要求該披露標籤作為市場准入條件。實務指引：（1）RoHS 不是烏干達 PVoC 門檻，故歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測負擔不轉移至烏干達出口；（2）但買家、跨國企業或下游再出口至 RoHS 市場仍可能在合同上要求 RoHS 合規——在存在此類要求時應遵守；（3）應核查適用烏干達/EAC 標準中的任何產品特定物質限值（如特定燈型汞限值），但這些範圍狹窄且產品特定，並非橫向電子禁令。注意不要誇大烏干達義務：烏干達無橫向 RoHS。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no horizontal regime) — Uganda has no EU-style RoHS substance-restriction regime or RoHS DoC requirement for market access; only narrow product-specific or general environmental/chemicals provisions may apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime — there is no Uganda RoHS substance-restriction law or RoHS Declaration of Conformity required to place LED luminaires on the market, and RoHS is not a UNBS PVoC gate. This is a genuine reduction in obligation versus EU export (no four-phthalate testing requirement for Uganda market access). China by contrast operates a RoHS disclosure-label regime for the original 6 substances. Exporters should still honour any contractual RoHS demands from buyers and check narrow product-specific substance limits (e.g., mercury in certain lamp categories) in applicable Uganda/EAC standards, but should not over-state a non-existent Uganda horizontal RoHS obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度——无乌干达 RoHS 物质限制法律，亦无须 RoHS 符合性声明即可将 LED 灯具投放市场，且 RoHS 不是 UNBS PVoC 门槛。相较出口欧盟，这是义务的实质减少（乌干达市场准入无四项邻苯二甲酸酯检测要求）。中国则对原 6 项物质实行 RoHS 披露标签制度。出口商仍应遵守买家任何合同 RoHS 要求，并核查适用乌干达/EAC 标准中狭窄的产品特定物质限值（如特定灯型汞限值），但不应夸大并不存在的乌干达横向 RoHS 义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度——無烏干達 RoHS 物質限制法律，亦無須 RoHS 符合性聲明即可將 LED 燈具投放市場，且 RoHS 不是 UNBS PVoC 門檻。相較出口歐盟，這是義務的實質減少（烏干達市場准入無四項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測要求）。中國則對原 6 項物質實行 RoHS 披露標籤制度。出口商仍應遵守買家任何合同 RoHS 要求，並核查適用烏干達/EAC 標準中狹窄的產品特定物質限值（如特定燈型汞限值），但不應誇大並不存在的烏干達橫向 RoHS 義務。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC Notification — No REACH-Style Uganda Obligation
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品/SVHC 通报——乌干达无 REACH 式义务
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品/SVHC 通報——烏干達無 REACH 式義務

summary.en: Uganda has no REACH-style supply-chain chemical-notification obligation equivalent to EU REACH Article 33 (the duty to notify business customers and consumers when an article contains a Substance of Very High Concern above 0.1% w/w), and no equivalent of the ECHA Candidate List or the SCIP database. There is no ongoing biannual SVHC-screening compliance duty tied to placing LED luminaires on the Uganda market. Uganda regulates chemicals through general national frameworks (e.g., NEMA-administered environmental and chemicals legislation, hazardous-waste and pesticides/industrial-chemicals controls) and international commitments (such as the Stockholm, Rotterdam, Basel, and Minamata Conventions, which constrain specific substances like mercury), but none of these creates a REACH-Article-33-type article-level supply-chain notification obligation for electronics. Exporters do not need a Uganda SVHC supply-chain process for market access.
summary.zh: 乌干达无相当于欧盟 REACH 第 33 条（物品中高度关注物质浓度超过 0.1% 质量分数时通报商业客户及消费者的义务）的 REACH 式供应链化学品通报义务，亦无相当于 ECHA 候选清单或 SCIP 数据库的制度。无与将 LED 灯具投放乌干达市场挂钩的持续每半年 SVHC 筛查合规义务。乌干达通过一般国家框架（如 NEMA 管理的环境及化学品立法、危险废物及农药/工业化学品管控）及国际承诺（如限制汞等特定物质的斯德哥尔摩、鹿特丹、巴塞尔及水俣公约）监管化学品，但上述均未为电子产品创设 REACH 第 33 条式的物品级供应链通报义务。出口商市场准入无需乌干达 SVHC 供应链流程。
summary.zht: 烏干達無相當於歐盟 REACH 第 33 條（物品中高度關注物質濃度超過 0.1% 質量分數時通報商業客戶及消費者的義務）的 REACH 式供應鏈化學品通報義務，亦無相當於 ECHA 候選清單或 SCIP 數據庫的制度。無與將 LED 燈具投放烏干達市場掛鈎的持續每半年 SVHC 篩查合規義務。烏干達通過一般國家框架（如 NEMA 管理的環境及化學品立法、危險廢物及農藥/工業化學品管控）及國際承諾（如限制汞等特定物質的斯德哥爾摩、鹿特丹、巴塞爾及水俁公約）監管化學品，但上述均未為電子產品創設 REACH 第 33 條式的物品級供應鏈通報義務。出口商市場准入無需烏干達 SVHC 供應鏈流程。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-equivalent SVHC supply-chain notification obligation in Uganda — no Candidate List / SCIP database equivalent
Uganda general chemicals/environmental frameworks (NEMA) and international conventions (Stockholm, Rotterdam, Basel, Minamata) constraining specific substances

summary.en: China also does not have a direct equivalent to REACH Article 33 supply-chain notification. The closest Chinese instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) for new-substance registration and GB 30981 / GB 13690 chemical classification and labelling rules for hazardous chemicals. None creates an obligation to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条供应链通报的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》）用于新物质登记，及 GB 30981 / GB 13690 危险化学品分类和标签规则。上述均未创设在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條供應鏈通報的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》）用於新物質登記，及 GB 30981 / GB 13690 危險化學品分類和標籤規則。上述均未創設在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 / GB 13690 — Classification and labelling rules for chemicals (China)

gap.en: Both Uganda and China lack a REACH-Article-33-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, so neither imposes the EU's ongoing biannual Candidate-List screening obligation. For a Chinese exporter to Uganda, this means: (1) no Uganda SVHC supply-chain notification process is required for market access — a clear reduction versus EU export; (2) no SCIP-type database registration applies; (3) however, contractual or buyer-driven REACH expectations may still arise if goods are intended for, or re-exported to, the EU/other REACH markets — manage those separately. The only Uganda-side chemical constraints relevant to LED luminaires are specific substance limits arising from international conventions (e.g., mercury under Minamata) or product-specific standard clauses, not a horizontal supply-chain SVHC duty. Do not over-state Uganda obligations: there is no REACH-equivalent in Uganda.
gap.zh: 乌干达与中国均无 REACH 第 33 条式的物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务，故均不施加欧盟持续每半年的候选清单筛查义务。对向乌干达出口的中国制造商而言，这意味着：（1）市场准入无需乌干达 SVHC 供应链通报流程——较出口欧盟为明显减少；（2）不适用 SCIP 式数据库注册；（3）但若货物拟用于或再出口至欧盟/其他 REACH 市场，仍可能产生合同或买家驱动的 REACH 期望——应另行管理。与 LED 灯具相关的乌干达侧化学品约束仅为源自国际公约的特定物质限值（如水俣公约下的汞）或产品特定标准条款，而非横向供应链 SVHC 义务。不要夸大乌干达义务：乌干达无 REACH 对应制度。
gap.zht: 烏干達與中國均無 REACH 第 33 條式的物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，故均不施加歐盟持續每半年的候選清單篩查義務。對向烏干達出口的中國製造商而言，這意味著：（1）市場准入無需烏干達 SVHC 供應鏈通報流程——較出口歐盟為明顯減少；（2）不適用 SCIP 式數據庫注冊；（3）但若貨物擬用於或再出口至歐盟/其他 REACH 市場，仍可能產生合同或買家驅動的 REACH 期望——應另行管理。與 LED 燈具相關的烏干達側化學品約束僅為源自國際公約的特定物質限值（如水俁公約下的汞）或產品特定標準條款，而非橫向供應鏈 SVHC 義務。不要誇大烏干達義務：烏干達無 REACH 對應制度。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no equivalent) — no REACH-Article-33-style SVHC supply-chain notification or SCIP-type registration in Uganda; only narrow convention-based substance limits may apply
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no supply-chain SVHC notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 exists in China as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda has no REACH-equivalent SVHC supply-chain notification obligation, no Candidate List, and no SCIP-type database — so the EU's ongoing biannual SVHC-screening duty does not transfer to Uganda export. China likewise has no REACH-Article-33 equivalent. Only narrow convention-driven substance limits (e.g., mercury under Minamata) or product-specific standard clauses may apply. Manage any REACH expectations separately where goods are intended for EU/other REACH markets, but do not assume a non-existent Uganda SVHC supply-chain duty.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达无 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报义务、无候选清单、无 SCIP 式数据库——故欧盟持续每半年的 SVHC 筛查义务不转移至乌干达出口。中国同样无 REACH 第 33 条对应制度。仅可能适用狭窄的公约驱动物质限值（如水俣公约下的汞）或产品特定标准条款。当货物拟用于欧盟/其他 REACH 市场时，应另行管理 REACH 期望，但不应假定并不存在的乌干达 SVHC 供应链义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達無 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務、無候選清單、無 SCIP 式數據庫——故歐盟持續每半年的 SVHC 篩查義務不轉移至烏干達出口。中國同樣無 REACH 第 33 條對應制度。僅可能適用狹窄的公約驅動物質限值（如水俁公約下的汞）或產品特定標準條款。當貨物擬用於歐盟/其他 REACH 市場時，應另行管理 REACH 期望，但不應假定並不存在的烏干達 SVHC 供應鏈義務。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Market-Access Process — UNBS PVoC / CoC / Q-Mark vs CCC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体市场准入流程——UNBS PVoC / CoC / Q 标志 vs CCC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體市場准入流程——UNBS PVoC / CoC / Q 標誌 vs CCC

summary.en: Market access for LED luminaires in Uganda runs through the UNBS conformity framework: (1) determine whether the product is on the regulated/PVoC list; (2) obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from a UNBS-appointed PVoC inspection body before shipment via Route A (consignment testing), Route B (product registration — reduces per-shipment testing for repeat exporters), or Route C (licensing — for established high-volume exporters with a quality system); (3) ensure the test evidence covers the applicable IEC-based standards (IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 and CISPR 15 EMC) with 240 V / 50 Hz ratings; (4) appoint an in-country importer of record to handle clearance and any UNBS import inspection / Q-Mark requirements; (5) ship via Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) as Uganda is landlocked, where a valid CoC is needed to avoid detention, fines, or re-export. For radio-enabled smart luminaires, add UCC type approval (see ledug-emc-02). There is no EU-style self-declaration / CE marking route — Uganda requires third-party PVoC verification for regulated products.
summary.zh: 乌干达 LED 灯具市场准入通过 UNBS 合格评定框架进行：（1）确定产品是否在受管制/PVoC 清单内；（2）在出货前经 UNBS 指定 PVoC 检验机构取得符合性证书（CoC），途径为路径 A（逐批检测）、路径 B（产品注册——为常出口商减少逐批检测）或路径 C（许可——面向具质量体系的成熟大批量出口商）；（3）确保检测证据涵盖适用的基于 IEC 的标准（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 及 CISPR 15 EMC）并按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定；（4）指定境内进口商办理清关及任何 UNBS 进口检验/Q 标志要求；（5）因乌干达为内陆国，经蒙巴萨（肯尼亚）或达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）发运，到港需有效 CoC 以免被扣留、罚款或退运。无线智能灯具还须加办 UCC 型号核准（见 ledug-emc-02）。无欧盟式自我声明/CE 标志路径——乌干达对受管制产品要求第三方 PVoC 验证。
summary.zht: 烏干達 LED 燈具市場准入通過 UNBS 合格評定框架進行：（1）確定產品是否在受管制/PVoC 清單內；（2）在出貨前經 UNBS 指定 PVoC 檢驗機構取得符合性證書（CoC），途徑為路徑 A（逐批檢測）、路徑 B（產品注冊——為常出口商減少逐批檢測）或路徑 C（許可——面向具質量體系的成熟大批量出口商）；（3）確保檢測證據涵蓋適用的基於 IEC 的標準（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / IEC 62471 及 CISPR 15 EMC）並按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定；（4）指定境內進口商辦理清關及任何 UNBS 進口檢驗/Q 標誌要求；（5）因烏干達為內陸國，經蒙巴薩（肯尼亞）或達累斯薩拉姆（坦桑尼亞）發運，到港需有效 CoC 以免被扣留、罰款或退運。無線智能燈具還須加辦 UCC 型號核准（見 ledug-emc-02）。無歐盟式自我聲明/CE 標誌路徑——烏干達對受管制產品要求第三方 PVoC 驗證。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards Programme — Route A (testing) / Route B (registration) / Route C (licensing); Certificate of Conformity required per regulated consignment
UNBS Import Inspection and Clearance / Q-Mark scheme
UCC equipment type approval — for radio-enabled luminaires (separate)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for residential luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, with mandatory third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body (e.g., CQC). Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally need SRRC type approval. CCC is a domestic certification mark, not a per-consignment export verification, and is not recognised by UNBS for Uganda market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，须由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行强制性第三方认证。集成无线功能的灯具还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 是国内认证标志，而非逐批出口验证，不被 UNBS 认可用于乌干达市场准入。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，須由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行強制性第三方認證。集成無線功能的燈具還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 是國內認證標誌，而非逐批出口驗證，不被 UNBS 認可用於烏干達市場准入。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Uganda's UNBS PVoC and China's CCC are parallel, non-mutual third-party schemes — a CCC certificate does not satisfy UNBS, and a Uganda CoC has no domestic-China standing. Both differ structurally from the EU self-declaration / CE route: both Uganda and China require third-party verification (unlike the EU's manufacturer self-declaration for standard luminaires). Key Uganda-specific points: (1) PVoC is consignment- or registration/licence-based, so a key planning decision is Route A vs B vs C to minimise repeat testing for ongoing shipments; (2) an in-country importer of record is required, and goods route through Mombasa/Dar es Salaam where a valid CoC prevents detention/fines/re-export; (3) the applicable standards are IEC/US-based (IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, CISPR 15), not EN; (4) products must be rated for 240 V / 50 Hz; (5) wireless products additionally need UCC type approval. Existing Chinese GB/IEC-based test reports from ILAC-recognised labs can often be leveraged within the PVoC process to reduce re-testing, subject to the appointed body's acceptance — confirm in advance.
gap.zh: 乌干达 UNBS PVoC 与中国 CCC 为并行、不互认的第三方方案——CCC 证书不满足 UNBS，乌干达 CoC 在中国国内无地位。二者均与欧盟自我声明/CE 路径结构不同：乌干达与中国均要求第三方验证（不同于欧盟对标准灯具的制造商自我声明）。乌干达特有要点：（1）PVoC 基于批次或注册/许可，故关键规划决策是路径 A 与 B 与 C 的选择，以减少持续发货的重复检测；（2）须设境内进口商，货物经蒙巴萨/达累斯萨拉姆，有效 CoC 可避免扣留/罚款/退运；（3）适用标准为基于 IEC/美标（IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471、CISPR 15），而非 EN；（4）产品须按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定；（5）无线产品还须取得 UCC 型号核准。来自 ILAC 认可实验室的现有中国 GB/IEC 检测报告通常可在 PVoC 流程内利用以减少重新检测，但须经指定机构接受——请预先确认。
gap.zht: 烏干達 UNBS PVoC 與中國 CCC 為並行、不互認的第三方方案——CCC 證書不滿足 UNBS，烏干達 CoC 在中國國內無地位。二者均與歐盟自我聲明/CE 路徑結構不同：烏干達與中國均要求第三方驗證（不同於歐盟對標準燈具的製造商自我聲明）。烏干達特有要點：（1）PVoC 基於批次或注冊/許可，故關鍵規劃決策是路徑 A 與 B 與 C 的選擇，以減少持續發貨的重複檢測；（2）須設境內進口商，貨物經蒙巴薩/達累斯薩拉姆，有效 CoC 可避免扣留/罰款/退運；（3）適用標準為基於 IEC/美標（IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471、CISPR 15），而非 EN；（4）產品須按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定；（5）無線產品還須取得 UCC 型號核准。來自 ILAC 認可實驗室的現有中國 GB/IEC 檢測報告通常可在 PVoC 流程內利用以減少重新檢測，但須經指定機構接受——請預先確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UNBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity required per regulated consignment (Route A/B/C); in-country importer of record and UNBS import inspection / Q-Mark where applicable; UCC type approval additionally for wireless products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally for wireless-enabled luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda market access for LED luminaires runs through the UNBS PVoC programme: obtain a Certificate of Conformity per regulated consignment (Route A testing / Route B registration / Route C licensing), against IEC/US-based standards (IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, CISPR 15) with 240 V / 50 Hz ratings, plus an in-country importer of record and UNBS import inspection / Q-Mark where applicable. UNBS PVoC and Chinese CCC are parallel, non-mutual third-party schemes; both differ from the EU self-declaration / CE route. Wireless luminaires additionally need UCC type approval. ILAC-recognised Chinese test reports may reduce re-testing within PVoC subject to the appointed body's acceptance — confirm Route and report acceptance in advance to avoid port detention at Mombasa / Dar es Salaam.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达 LED 灯具市场准入通过 UNBS PVoC 方案进行：按受管制批次取得符合性证书（路径 A 检测/路径 B 注册/路径 C 许可），依据基于 IEC/美标的标准（IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471、CISPR 15）并按 240 V / 50 Hz 评定，另设境内进口商及适用时的 UNBS 进口检验/Q 标志。UNBS PVoC 与中国 CCC 为并行、不互认的第三方方案；二者均与欧盟自我声明/CE 路径不同。无线灯具还须取得 UCC 型号核准。ILAC 认可的中国检测报告在 PVoC 内可减少重新检测，但须经指定机构接受——请预先确认路径及报告接受，以免在蒙巴萨/达累斯萨拉姆口岸被扣留。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達 LED 燈具市場准入通過 UNBS PVoC 方案進行：按受管制批次取得符合性證書（路徑 A 檢測/路徑 B 注冊/路徑 C 許可），依據基於 IEC/美標的標準（IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471、CISPR 15）並按 240 V / 50 Hz 評定，另設境內進口商及適用時的 UNBS 進口檢驗/Q 標誌。UNBS PVoC 與中國 CCC 為並行、不互認的第三方方案；二者均與歐盟自我聲明/CE 路徑不同。無線燈具還須取得 UCC 型號核准。ILAC 認可的中國檢測報告在 PVoC 內可減少重新檢測，但須經指定機構接受——請預先確認路徑及報告接受，以免在蒙巴薩/達累斯薩拉姆口岸被扣留。
